item.label: Add unit test coverage for knowledge component modules
item.summary: Create unit tests for search, bootstrap, sync, config modules targeting 80%+ coverage

body:
# Description

Add comprehensive unit tests for core knowledge component modules:

1. **search.py** (136 lines) — Test filter_by_metadata, search_pages, scoring
2. **bootstrap.py** (296 lines) — Test initialization, config loading, validation
3. **sync.py** (546 lines) — Test file watch, sync operations, event emission
4. **config.py** (311 lines) — Test config loading, schema validation, defaults
5. **models.py** (111 lines) — Test SearchResult, page models

Target: 40+ unit tests, 80%+ code coverage for these modules.

# Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Unit tests added to tests/unit/knowledge/ (new directory)
- [ ] Test files: test_search.py, test_bootstrap.py, test_sync.py, test_config.py, test_models.py
- [ ] Each module has tests for main functions and edge cases
- [ ] Coverage report shows >80% for target modules
- [ ] Tests run clean with pytest
- [ ] No dependencies on external services (all mocked)

# Notes

Do not include tests for llm.py (leave for separate test work).
Use fixtures for file I/O and config setup.
See standard-0006 for test structure expectations.
"
